description: "E1.3.4 LLM Content Optimization: existing ContentNormaliser signatures, markdown stripping gaps, share intent state machine, go_router routes, and project rules for hardening the share-from-LLM pipeline"
applyTo: "lib/features/content/services/content_normaliser.dart,lib/features/content/providers/share_intent_provider.dart,lib/app.dart,lib/navigation/app_router.dart,test/features/content/services/content_normaliser_test.dart"
---

# E1.3.4 — LLM Content Optimization — Shared Context

LLM chat apps (ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini) share responses via the OS share sheet as `text/plain`.
The share plumbing (E1.3.1) already works. This epic fixes **content quality** and **UX flow**.

---

## Problem Statement

LLM responses contain markdown that the current `_stripMarkdown` does NOT handle:

| Pattern | Example | Current behavior |
|---------|---------|-----------------|
| Fenced code blocks | ` ```python\ndef foo():\n    pass\n``` ` | Backticks + raw code become words |
| Fenced blocks (no lang) | ` ```\nsome code\n``` ` | Same — triple backticks remain |
| Tables | `\| Col \| Col \|\n\|---\|---\|` | Pipes and dashes become words |
| Indented code (4 spaces) | `    const x = 1;` | Raw code becomes words |
| Escape sequences | `\*not italic\*` | Backslash remains |
| Footnotes | `[^1]` / `[^1]: def` | Reference markers remain |
| Email autolinks | `<user@example.com>` | Angle brackets remain |

**User impact**: Pacing engine flashes `"```python"`, `"def"`, `"|---|"` as individual words.

---

## Existing Code Signatures

### ContentNormaliser (lib/features/content/services/content_normaliser.dart)

```dart
class ContentNormaliser {
  static Future<ExtractedDocument> normalise(String input, ContentType type) async;
  static ExtractedDocument _normaliseSync(String input, ContentType type);
  static String _stripHtml(String html);
  static String _stripMarkdown(String text);     // ← TARGET METHOD
  static String _decodeEntities(String text);
  static List<Sentence> _textToSentences(String text);
  static List<PageBoundary> _generatePageBoundaries(List<Sentence> sentences);
}

enum ContentType { plainText, markdown, html }
```

**`_stripMarkdown` current order of operations:**
1. Images `![alt](url)` → alt
2. Links `[text](url)` → text
3. Reference links `[text][ref]` → text
4. Heading markers `# ...` → text
5. Horizontal rules `---` → removed
6. Blockquote markers `>` → text
7. Bold+italic `***text***` → text
8. Bold `**text**` → text
9. Italic `*text*` → text
10. Strikethrough `~~text~~` → text
11. Inline code `` `code` `` → text
12. Unordered list markers
13. Ordered list markers
14. Collapse blank lines

**NEW patterns must be inserted BEFORE step 11 (inline code)** — fenced code blocks
must be removed before inline code backtick matching runs.

### ShareIntentProvider (lib/features/content/providers/share_intent_provider.dart)

```dart
sealed class ShareIntentState {
  const factory ShareIntentState.idle() = ShareIntentIdle;
  const factory ShareIntentState.processing({required SharedContent content, double progress}) = ShareIntentProcessing;
  const factory ShareIntentState.done({required SharedContent content, required ExtractedDocument document}) = ShareIntentDone;
  const factory ShareIntentState.error({required String message, SharedContent? content}) = ShareIntentError;
}

@Riverpod(keepAlive: true)
class ShareIntent extends _$ShareIntent {
  ShareIntentState build();
  Future<void> ingest(SharedContent content) async;
  Future<void> checkAppGroupContainer(String appGroupPath) async;
  void clear();
}
```

### Go Router (lib/navigation/app_router.dart)

Relevant routes:
- `/` — HomeShell (library tabs)
- `/read?path=<filePath>` — ParallaxReadingScreen (file-based)
- `/read-clipboard` — ParallaxReadingScreen with `ClipboardDocument` via `state.extra`
- `/read-legacy?path=<filePath>` — ReadingScreen (legacy)

`ParallaxReadingScreen` constructor:
```dart
const ParallaxReadingScreen({
  super.key,
  required this.filePath,
  this.clipboardDocument,
});
```

### _ContentLifecycleObserver (lib/app.dart)

Currently only triggers clipboard detection and iOS App Group check on resume.
Does NOT watch `shareIntentProvider` for navigation.

---

## Regex Ordering Rule

Fenced code blocks MUST be stripped before inline code backtick removal.
If inline code runs first, it will match the opening `` ``` `` as an inline code span,
leaving orphaned backticks.

**Correct order**: fenced code → indented code → tables → footnotes → ... (existing patterns) ... → inline code

---

## Out of Scope — Do NOT Touch

- `lib/core/orp.dart`
- `lib/three_d/`
- `lib/widgets/context_reveal_overlay.dart`
- `lib/core/gesture_classifier.dart`
- `lib/core/wpm_dial_notifier.dart`
- Android native code (`android/`)
- iOS native code (`ios/`)

---

## Hard Rules (subset relevant to this epic)

1. All colors via design tokens. No raw `Color(0xFF...)`.
2. All text styles via typography tokens.
3. Riverpod for state. No `setState()` for shared state.
4. go_router only. No `Navigator.push()`.
5. Heavy computation in Isolates (ContentNormaliser already handles this).
6. All public symbols have dartdoc comments.
7. `dart analyze` must report zero issues.
8. Do not introduce new test failures.

## Test Baseline

Existing `content_normaliser_test.dart` has these groups:
- `ContentNormaliser — plain text` (6 tests)
- `ContentNormaliser — Markdown` (7 tests)
- `ContentNormaliser — HTML` (8 tests)
- `ContentNormaliser — output contract` (3 tests)
- `ContentNormaliser — large input` (1 test)

All pass. New tests go in a new group: `ContentNormaliser — LLM markdown patterns`.
